scenario.name: UAC REGISTER Multi-Contact
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:5060>;expires=3600 Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:5061>;expires=3600 Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:5062>;expires=1800 Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
